title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: Celebrity duos tackle culinary challenges set by a renowned chef while engaging in communal activities to captivate viewers with their cooking skills and teamwork.

title: Laughter Chefs Unlimited Entertainment
subTitle: The celebrity contestants are tasked with making zucchini mushroom brownies. Orry Awatramani joins the show and entertains everyone.

subTitle: The contestants from 'Fear Factor: Khatron Ke Khiladi', arrive and team up with the chefs. Later, laughter ensues as they make imarti together.

subTitle: The celebrity contestants prepare Sambar and Medu Vada, the South Indian dishes, to impress guest Suniel Shetty.

subTitle: With their family among the audience, the contestants team up with one family member to prepare the best 'Chole Bhature' with a hilarious twist.

subTitle: The contestants switch partners while challenging each other to prepare a host of popular delicacies. Later, the chefs must prepare 'parathas' with a tangy twist.

title: Noyontara
subTitle: Noyontara's ability to communicate with spirits enables her to bridge the gap between realms and uncover veiled truths. Her marriage into the Sengupta family sets in motion a series of revelations.

title: Tuu Juliet Jatt Di
subTitle: Focused Heer encounters privileged Nawab, sparking an unexpected romance. Their journey unfolds amidst challenges, revealing a tale of love intertwined with deception and emotional turmoil.

title: Mannat Harr Khushi Paane Ki
subTitle: Mannat, a gifted young chef, dreams big but faces a formidable obstacle, her ruthless employer Aishwarya. Unknown to both, Aishwarya is also Mannat's birth mother who abandoned her when she was born.

title: DR. Aarambhi
subTitle: Bound by marriage, former AIPMT topper Aarambhi clings to a hidden dream, waiting for the spark to ignite her second act.

title: Mangal Lakshmi
subTitle: Mangal sets off on a journey to find an ideal match for Lakshmi. However, love and trials test their sisterhood, unveiling destiny's power.

title: Mangal Lakshmi - Lakshmi Ka Safar
subTitle: The emotional ups and downs and struggles in Lakshmi's life that transform her from a weak woman to a fearless warrior who tackles her problems head on.
